items.title: Robinhood's venture fund, which gives investors access to private companies, tanks 11% on first day
items.description: Robinhood's Venture Fund I plunged 11% in its debut on the New York Stock Exchange on Friday, casting doubt on investors' appetite for riskier investm...

items.title: Fed Governor Miran says job losses in February add to the case for more interest rate cuts
items.description: Miran said in a CNBC interview that the Fed should be focusing more on supporting the labor market than worrying about inflation.

items.title: U.S.-Iran war exposes big market concentration risk. It isn't in S&P 500 stocks
items.description: Oil prices soar in the U.S.-Iran war, leading to volatility in emerging markets, and showing how concentrated EM funds are in Asian economies.
